message:
fix: stop running daemon during bd init to prevent stale cache (bd-7h7)

When bd init reinitializes, the running daemon retains the old database
in memory. Commands routed through the daemon (e.g., bd stats) continue
showing stale counts. Now bd init stops any running daemon before creating
the new database, using the existing stopDaemonQuiet helper from bd reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
